ruleRanking: Lower rank is better. If user has multiple passports, pick the matching rule with the lowest rank. Within the same rank, prefer longer durationDays, then fewer application steps, then multiple-entry over single-entry.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism entry for 60 days, typically extendable once by 30 days.
visaRules.notes: Frequent back-to-back entries may be scrutinized.

visaRules.summary: Visa on arrival for short tourism stays.
visaRules.notes: Check current VOA eligibility before travel.

visaRules.summary: Tourist visa required before travel; typical tourist visa stay is 60 days.
visaRules.notes: Exact eligibility and entry count depend on nationality and consulate.

visaRules.summary: Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) — 180 days per entry, multi-entry, 5-year validity, for remote workers and digital nomads.
requirements: Proof of remote work / freelance / Thai soft-power activity
visaRules.notes: Allows remote work for foreign employers; does not permit local employment.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism entry for selected passports, commonly up to 45 days.
visaRules.notes: Visa-exempt list changes; use official source before travel.

visaRules.summary: Vietnam eVisa is available for citizens of all countries and territories for up to 90 days, single or multiple entry.
visaRules.notes: Use the official eVisa portal.

visaRules.summary: Visa on arrival/e-VOA for 30 days, extendable once by 30 days.
visaRules.notes: Common for Bali/Indonesia tourism.

visaRules.summary: Visitor/tourist visa required before travel if not eligible for VOA/e-VOA.
visaRules.notes: Stay length and extension depend on visa type granted.

visaRules.summary: Remote Worker Visa (E33G) — up to 1 year for employees of overseas companies working remotely from Indonesia.
visaRules.notes: Does not allow local Indonesian employment.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism stay up to 90 days for visa-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Some exempt passports may receive shorter stays; verify nationality-specific rules.

visaRules.summary: Temporary Visitor visa required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Exact validity and entries depend on nationality and visa granted.

visaRules.summary: Designated Activities (Digital Nomad) — 6 months, non-extendable, for remote workers from treaty/exempt countries.
visaRules.notes: Spouse/children may qualify. Cannot be extended.

visaRules.summary: Working Holiday visa — usually up to 1 year for young citizens of partner countries/regions.
requirements: Age limits vary by agreement, usually 18–30
visaRules.notes: US and Singapore are generally not included. Quotas and age limits vary.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free Schengen stay up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
requirements: Proof of funds/onward travel may be requested
visaRules.notes: Limit is shared across all Schengen countries.

visaRules.summary: Schengen short-stay visa required before travel; permits up to 90 days in any 180-day period if granted.
visaRules.notes: Validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: D8 Digital Nomad Visa — temporary stay/residence route for remote workers and freelancers.
visaRules.notes: Requirements and renewal paths vary; verify with consulate.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free Schengen stay up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
requirements: Proof of funds/onward travel may be requested
visaRules.notes: Limit is shared across all Schengen countries.

visaRules.summary: Schengen short-stay visa required before travel; permits up to 90 days in any 180-day period if granted.
visaRules.notes: Validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: Digital Nomad Visa — remote work residence path, initially around 1 year and renewable in Spain.
requirements: Apply before travel or in-country if eligible
visaRules.notes: Requirements and renewal paths vary; verify with consulate.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free visitor stay up to 180 days, but exact days are granted by the immigration officer.
visaRules.notes: 180 days is the maximum, not guaranteed.

visaRules.summary: Visa-exempt if holding a valid visa/residence permit from the US, Canada, UK, Japan, or Schengen.
visaRules.notes: Useful fallback for passports that otherwise need a Mexican visa.

visaRules.summary: Visitor visa required before travel unless exempt.
visaRules.notes: Final stay length is still set by immigration on entry.

visaRules.summary: Temporary Resident Visa — 1 year initially, renewable up to 4 years total. Commonly used by remote workers.
visaRules.notes: No formal digital nomad visa exists; temporary residency is the common path.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free stay up to 365 days for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Popular long-stay destination.

visaRules.summary: Non-exempt passports may need an eVisa or tourist visa before travel.
visaRules.notes: Exact eligibility and duration depend on nationality.

visaRules.summary: Many visa-free nationals can work remotely while staying up to 365 days, subject to Georgian law and tax considerations.
requirements: Proof of remote income may be useful
visaRules.notes: Georgia's COVID-era remote worker program is no longer the main path; the 365-day visa-free regime is the practical basis.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism stay up to 90 days within a 180-day period for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Some nationalities may require eVisa instead.

visaRules.summary: eVisa or tourist visa may be required before travel.
visaRules.notes: Duration and entry count vary by nationality.

visaRules.summary: Turkey Digital Nomad Visa — around 1 year, for eligible remote workers from listed countries.
requirements: Age and education criteria may apply
visaRules.notes: Eligible nationalities are limited; verify current list.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism/social visit stay up to 90 days for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Extensions may be possible but should not be assumed.

visaRules.summary: Many ASEAN nationals can enter visa-free for short social visits.
visaRules.notes: Rules vary by ASEAN nationality.

visaRules.summary: Tourist eVisa or visitor visa may be required for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Exact eligibility depends on nationality.

visaRules.summary: DE Rantau Nomad Pass — 1 year, multi-entry, renewable for another year, for digital nomads in IT/digital roles.
visaRules.notes: Targeted at IT/digital sector professionals.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry up to 180 days for eligible passports such as Canada; K-ETA may be required unless exempted.
visaRules.notes: K-ETA exemptions can change.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry up to 90 days for many passports; K-ETA may be required unless exempted.
visaRules.notes: Includes Japan and many additional visa-waiver countries; verify K-ETA status before travel.

visaRules.summary: Short-term general tourist visa required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Exact validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: F-1-D Workation/Digital Nomad visa — 1 year, extendable once, for remote workers employed overseas.
visaRules.notes: Pilot program extended until further notice.

visaRules.summary: Working Holiday visa — generally up to 1 year for young citizens of partner countries/regions.
visaRules.notes: US nationals may have extension options; quotas and rules vary.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry up to 59 days for selected passports under bilateral arrangements.
visaRules.notes: Extension rules vary.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry up to 30 days for nationals of many countries.
visaRules.notes: Can often be extended after arrival.

visaRules.summary: Indian nationals may enter visa-free for short tourism stays under specific conditions.
visaRules.notes: Indian nationals with certain valid visas/residence permits may qualify for longer stays.

visaRules.summary: Temporary Visitor Visa (9a) required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Initial stay commonly up to 59 days, depending on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: Entry visa required before travel for listed visa-required passports.
requirements: Sufficient funds/onward travel may be requested
visaRules.notes: Visa does not guarantee entry; final permission is granted at checkpoint.

visaRules.summary: No entry visa required for passports not on Singapore's visa-required list; length of stay is granted by immigration.
visaRules.notes: Many common passports receive 30 or 90 days depending on nationality and officer decision.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry permit up to 90 days, extendable to a maximum of 180 days per calendar year.
visaRules.notes: Total stay cannot usually exceed 180 days per calendar year.

visaRules.summary: Visitor visa required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: Visitor Visa for Digital Nomads — up to 2 years for remote workers, entrepreneurs, or freelancers with foreign clients.
visaRules.notes: Eligibility is linked to being visa-exempt for short stays.

visaRules.summary: eVisa required for US, Canadian, and Australian passport holders for tourism/business visits.
visaRules.notes: Brazil reinstated eVisa requirements for US/Canada/Australia from April 2025.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free tourism stay commonly up to 90 days for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Rules vary by nationality; extensions may be possible.

visaRules.summary: Visitor visa required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: Digital Nomad temporary visa/residence authorization — typically 1 year, renewable, for remote workers.
requirements: Criminal background check may be required
visaRules.notes: Requirements and processing vary by consulate.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free entry up to 90 days for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Extensions may be possible in-country.

visaRules.summary: Electronic Travel Authorization may be available for eligible Chinese passport holders with a valid US visa.
visaRules.notes: Eligibility and terms may change.

visaRules.summary: Tourist visa required before travel for non-exempt passports.
visaRules.notes: Validity and entries depend on visa issued.

visaRules.summary: Digital Nomad Visa — temporary stay for remote workers, commonly 180 days with possible extension.
visaRules.notes: Program details and availability should be verified before relying on it.

visaRules.summary: Visa-free/visa-on-arrival access commonly up to 90 days within 180 days for many passports.
visaRules.notes: Duration varies by nationality.

visaRules.summary: Visa on arrival commonly up to 30 days for selected passports.
visaRules.notes: Extension rules vary.

visaRules.summary: Conditional visa on arrival for Indian passport holders with qualifying visas/residence permits.
requirements: Qualifying US/UK/EU visa or residence permit
visaRules.notes: Check UAE official eligibility before travel.

visaRules.summary: Tourist visa required before travel if not eligible for visa on arrival.
requirements: Apply via airline, hotel, travel agency, or sponsor
visaRules.notes: Validity and extensions depend on visa type.

visaRules.summary: Virtual Work Residence Visa — around 1 year for remote workers employed outside the UAE.
visaRules.notes: Requirements vary by emirate/platform.
